title: Showers & thundershowers likely on Tuesday (21)
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st): The Department of Meteorology announced that showers will occur at times in Western, Sabaragamuwa, and Northwestern provinces and Kandy, Nuwara-Eliya, Galle, and Matara districts.
Showers or thundershowers will occur at a few places in Uva and Eastern provinces and the Mullaitivu district during the afternoon or night.
The general public is kindly requested to take adequate precautions to minimize damages caused by temporary localized strong winds and lightning during thundershowers.
21A passed by Cabinet; To be tabled in Parliament soon – Harin
